chunks.title: Code of Conduct
chunks.text: # Code of Conduct

chunks.title: Code of Conduct
chunks.text:
Professional Behavior

Employees are expected to maintain a professional, respectful, and inclusive workplace.

chunks.title: Code of Conduct
chunks.text:
Harassment

Harassment, discrimination, and retaliation are prohibited.

chunks.title: Code of Conduct
chunks.text:
Conflicts of Interest

Employees must disclose any actual or potential conflicts of interest to Human Resources.

chunks.title: Code of Conduct
chunks.text:
Reporting Concerns

Concerns regarding workplace conduct may be reported confidentially to Human Resources.

chunks.title: Equipment Policy
chunks.text: # Equipment Policy

chunks.title: Equipment Policy
chunks.text:
Standard Equipment

All employees are provided with a company laptop and docking station.

chunks.title: Equipment Policy
chunks.text:
Replacement Schedule

Laptops are eligible for replacement every 4 years.

chunks.title: Equipment Policy
chunks.text:
Lost Equipment

Lost or stolen equipment must be reported to IT within 24 hours.

chunks.title: Equipment Policy
chunks.text:
Personal Use

Limited personal use of company equipment is permitted provided it does not interfere with business operations.

chunks.title: Expense Reimbursement Policy
chunks.text: # Expense Reimbursement Policy

chunks.title: Expense Reimbursement Policy
chunks.text:
General Guidelines

Business-related expenses may be reimbursed when properly documented.

chunks.title: Expense Reimbursement Policy
chunks.text:
Home Office Equipment

Employees may expense one monitor up to $300 every 3 years.

Manager approval is required before purchase.

chunks.title: Expense Reimbursement Policy
chunks.text:
Meals

Client meals up to $75 per person are reimbursable.

chunks.title: Expense Reimbursement Policy
chunks.text:
Submission Deadline

Expense reports must be submitted within 30 days of the purchase date.

chunks.title: Holiday Policy
chunks.text:
# Holiday Policy

BrightWave Technologies observes the following paid holidays:

- New Year's Day
- Martin Luther King Jr. Day
- Memorial Day
- Juneteenth
- Independence Day
- Labor Day
- Thanksgiving Day
- Day After Thanksgiving
- Christmas Eve
- Christmas Day

Employees receive 10 paid company holidays annually.

chunks.title: Information Security Policy
chunks.text: # Information Security Policy

chunks.title: Information Security Policy
chunks.text:
Password Requirements

Passwords must contain at least 12 characters and include a combination of uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters.

chunks.title: Information Security Policy
chunks.text:
Multi-Factor Authentication

Multi-factor authentication (MFA) is required for all company systems.

chunks.title: Information Security Policy
chunks.text:
Phishing Reporting

Employees must report suspected phishing emails to the IT Security Team within 24 hours.

chunks.title: Information Security Policy
chunks.text:
Device Security

Company devices must automatically lock after 10 minutes of inactivity.

Employees may not install unauthorized software on company devices.

chunks.title: Parental Leave Policy
chunks.text: # Parental Leave Policy

chunks.title: Parental Leave Policy
chunks.text:
Eligibility

Employees with at least 12 months of service are eligible.

chunks.title: Parental Leave Policy
chunks.text:
Paid Leave

Eligible employees receive 12 weeks of fully paid parental leave.

chunks.title: Parental Leave Policy
chunks.text:
Usage

Leave must be used within 12 months of the child's birth or adoption.

chunks.title: Performance Review Policy
chunks.text: # Performance Review Policy

chunks.title: Performance Review Policy
chunks.text:
Review Schedule

Performance reviews are conducted twice per year.

chunks.title: Performance Review Policy
chunks.text:
Goal Setting

Employees and managers will establish annual performance goals during the first quarter of each year.

chunks.title: Performance Review Policy
chunks.text:
Promotion Consideration

Employees must have at least one completed performance review cycle before being considered for promotion.

chunks.title: Performance Review Policy
chunks.text:
Performance Improvement Plans

Employees not meeting expectations may be placed on a Performance Improvement Plan (PIP) lasting 60 days.

chunks.title: Paid Time Off (PTO) Policy
chunks.text: # Paid Time Off (PTO) Policy

chunks.title: Paid Time Off (PTO) Policy
chunks.text:
Eligibility

All full-time employees of BrightWave Technologies are eligible for paid time off benefits beginning on their first day of employment.

chunks.title: Paid Time Off (PTO) Policy
chunks.text:
Annual PTO Allowance

Employees receive 20 days of PTO per calendar year.

PTO may be used for vacation, personal business, or other approved absences.

chunks.title: Paid Time Off (PTO) Policy
chunks.text:
Carryover

Employees may carry over up to 5 unused PTO days into the following calendar year.

Any PTO above 5 days will be forfeited on January 1.

chunks.title: Paid Time Off (PTO) Policy
chunks.text:
Sick Leave

Employees receive 10 paid sick days per calendar year.

Unused sick leave does not carry over.

chunks.title: Paid Time Off (PTO) Policy
chunks.text:
Approval Process

PTO requests of more than three consecutive days must be submitted at least two weeks in advance and approved by the employee's manager.

chunks.title: Remote Work Policy
chunks.text: # Remote Work Policy

chunks.title: Remote Work Policy
chunks.text:
Eligibility

Employees may work remotely after completing 90 days of employment.

chunks.title: Remote Work Policy
chunks.text:
Standard Schedule

Eligible employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week.

Employees are expected to work on-site at least 2 days per week.

chunks.title: Remote Work Policy
chunks.text:
Work Hours

Employees must be available between 9:00 AM and 3:00 PM local time.

chunks.title: Remote Work Policy
chunks.text:
Equipment

Employees are responsible for maintaining a reliable internet connection.

The company provides one laptop and necessary peripherals.

chunks.title: Business Travel Policy
chunks.text: # Business Travel Policy

chunks.title: Business Travel Policy
chunks.text:
Air Travel

Employees should book economy-class airfare for domestic travel.

Flights exceeding $600 require manager approval.

chunks.title: Business Travel Policy
chunks.text:
Lodging

Hotel accommodations up to $250 per night are reimbursable.

chunks.title: Business Travel Policy
chunks.text:
Ground Transportation

Reasonable taxi, rideshare, and public transportation expenses are reimbursable.

chunks.title: Business Travel Policy
chunks.text:
Submission Requirements

Travel expenses must be submitted within 30 days of trip completion.
